'''Dassid''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] who was the [[King/Legends|king]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], his reign started after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of his mother, [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Rana Mas Trehalt]]. He continued his mother's policies of offworld exploration, expansion, and diplomacy.

After his death, his crown was implanted with a murderous device, capable of killing any and all grave robbers. [[Dustini Spa Ronii]] activated the device on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] while attempting to gain support from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1stm}}
